sections.title: Overview
sections.body_md: Synthetic two-file C# project. The aim is to exercise the codebase archetype's synthesized companion path. See [[companion:overview]].

sections.title: Control flow
sections.body_md: Constructor injection: `Service` receives an `IProvider` and forwards greeting wrapping to it. See [Service.Greet](src/Service.cs:7).

sections.title: Extension points
sections.body_md: Implement `IProvider` to plug a new greeting transformation. See [DefaultProvider](src/Provider.cs:9).

final_quiz.question: Which file is the public façade?

glossary.definition: An entry-point class that hides the details of underlying collaborators.
